title: PVP Cobweb
description: Made for pvp too make cobweb more easier too spot, simple as that
body:
> **⚠️ IMPORTANT ⚠️**

---
![correct order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba1a2b5b3ce92335856bbb021ae21b69b9db028f.png)
**IF OTHER TEXTURE PACKS ARE USED RED COBWEB MUST BE AT THE TOP TOO WORK**


**Just a simple texture pack that makes cobweb red too make it easier too spot while in pvp.**
